feature: TradeHub B2B Field Validation & Data Integrity Enhancement (Gorev 1-5)
workflow_rationale: Five interconnected data integrity enhancements spanning 7 apps: child table calculations, role-based field auth, cascading discounts, JSON-to-child-table migration, and fetch_from completion. This adds new functionality (cascading discounts, authorization layers) while enhancing existing patterns across 233+ DocTypes.

phases.name: Commerce App JSON Schema Updates
phases.description: Apply all Gorev 2 (read_only, set_only_once), Gorev 3 (cascading discount fields), and Gorev 5 (fetch_from) JSON schema changes to tradehub_commerce DocTypes. Pure JSON editing — no code logic changes.

subtasks.description: Update order.json and order_item.json: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system fields (order_number, confirmed_date, dates), set_only_once:1 to buyer/seller. (G3) Add discount_1, discount_2, discount_3, effective_discount_pct, show_discount_tiers fields; hide old discount_percentage. (G5) Verify existing fetch_from completeness.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/order/order.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; assert 'discount_1' in fields, 'discount_1 missing'; assert fields.get('buyer',{}).get('set_only_once')==1, 'set_only_once missing on buyer'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Updated order.json and order_item.json: (G3) Added discount_1, discount_2, discount_3, effective_discount_pct, show_discount_tiers fields; hid old discount_percentage. (G2) Verified read_only:1 on system fields and set_only_once:1 on buyer/seller - already present. (G5) Verified fetch_from completeness - all relationships intact. All verification checks passed.

subtasks.description: Update cart.json and cart_line.json: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system fields. (G3) Add discount_1/2/3 fields to cart_line.json. (G5) Add fetch_from for listing_title, listing_image, seller_name in cart_line.json with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/cart_line/cart_line.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; assert 'discount_1' in fields, 'discount_1 missing'; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Updated cart.json: G2 added read_only:1 to last_activity and naming_series. Updated cart_line.json: G2 added read_only:1 to reserved_at and stock_reserved. G3 added discount_1/2/3, show_discount_tiers, effective_discount_pct fields following order.json pattern. G5 verified fetch_from already configured for title, primary_image, seller_name all with read_only:1. All 20 verification checks passed. Commit c323580.

subtasks.description: Update sub_order.json, sub_order_item.json, marketplace_order.json, marketplace_order_item.json: (G2) Add read_only:1, set_only_once:1 as specified. (G3) Add cascading discount fields. (G5) Add fetch_from fields for buyer/seller/tenant names with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/sub_order/sub_order.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; assert 'discount_1' in fields; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added cascading discount fields (discount_1/2/3, show_discount_tiers, effective_discount_pct) to all 4 files following order.json pattern. G2 verified: read_only:1 on system fields and set_only_once:1 on primary links already in place. G5 verified: all buyer/seller/tenant name fetch_from with read_only:1 already configured; added missing fetch_from on sub_order_item.sku. All validations passed. Commit 6bb2a92.

subtasks.description: Update rfq.json, rfq_quote.json, rfq_quote_item.json: (G2) Add set_only_once:1 to buyer (rfq) and seller/rfq (rfq_quote). (G3) Add cascading discount fields to rfq_quote_item.json. (G5) Add fetch_from for buyer_name, seller_name, tenant_name with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/rfq/rfq.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; b=fields.get('buyer',{}); assert b.get('set_only_once')==1, 'buyer set_only_once missing'; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Update quotation.json, quotation_item.json, commission_plan.json, escrow_account.json: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system/computed fields. (G3) Add cascading discount fields to quotation_item.json.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/quotation_item/quotation_item.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; assert 'discount_1' in fields; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: G2: Added permlevel:1 to buyer_evaluation_score, buyer_evaluation_notes, rejection_reason in quotation.json. Added read_only:1 to 8 system/computed fields in escrow_account.json (platform_fee, processing_fee, delivery_confirmed_at, payout_error, payout_reference, original/extended_release_date, erpnext_sync_error). Commission_plan.json already fully protected - no changes needed. G3: Added cascading discount fields (discount_1/2/3, show_discount_tiers, effective_discount_pct, discount_amount) to quotation_item.json following order_item.json pattern. All verification checks passed. Commit 8315a8b.

phases.name: Non-Commerce Apps JSON Schema Updates
phases.description: Apply Gorev 2 (field authorization), Gorev 3 (discount fields for Listing), and Gorev 5 (fetch_from) JSON changes to core, catalog, seller, logistics, marketing, and compliance apps.

subtasks.description: Update tradehub_core JSONs: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system fields in buyer_profile.json, tenant.json, organization.json, kyc_profile.json. (G5) Add fetch_from for buyer_category_name, tenant_name, organization_name in buyer_profile.json with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/buyer_profile/buyer_profile.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; ff=[f for f in fields.values() if f.get('fetch_from')]; print(f'{len(ff)} fetch_from fields found - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added read_only:1 to system fields: buyer_profile (email_verified, phone_verified, identity_verified), tenant (subscription_start_date, subscription_end_date), organization (documents_verified, tax_documents_verified, trade_registry_verified), kyc_profile (pep_status). G5 fetch_from fields already complete in buyer_profile (buyer_category_name, tenant_name, organization_name all have fetch_from + read_only:1). Commit: de39245

subtasks.description: Update product.json in tradehub_catalog: (G5) Add fetch_from for Category and Brand display fields with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/doctype/product/product.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; ff=[f for f in fields.values() if f.get('fetch_from')]; print(f'{len(ff)} fetch_from fields - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Verified product.json already has all G5 fetch_from fields correctly configured: brand_name (fetch_from: brand.brand_name, read_only:1), category_name (fetch_from: category.category_name, read_only:1), family_name (fetch_from: product_family.family_name, read_only:1). Updated modified timestamp.

subtasks.description: Update seller_profile.json and listing.json in tradehub_seller: (G2) Add read_only:1 to metrics/system fields, set_only_once:1 to seller in listing. (G3) Add cascading discount fields to listing.json. (G5) Add fetch_from for tenant_name, tier_name, district_name, neighborhood_name, organization_name in seller_profile; seller_name, category_name, tenant_name in listing.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; sp=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/seller_profile/seller_profile.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in sp['fields']}; ff=[f for f in fields.values() if f.get('fetch_from')]; print(f'Seller Profile: {len(ff)} fetch_from fields - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added cascading discount fields (discount_1, show_discount_tiers, discount_2, discount_3, effective_discount_pct, discount_amount) to listing.json following order.json pattern. Verified seller_profile.json already has all required G2 (read_only:1 on metrics/system fields) and G5 (fetch_from for tenant_name, tier_name, district_name, neighborhood_name, organization_name) changes. Listing.json already had set_only_once:1 on seller, read_only:1 on system fields, and fetch_from for seller_name, category_name, tenant_name.

subtasks.description: Update buy_box_entry.json and seller_application.json in tradehub_seller: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system/computed fields, set_only_once:1 where appropriate.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/buy_box_entry/buy_box_entry.json')); ro=[f for f in d['fields'] if f.get('read_only')==1]; print(f'{len(ro)} read_only fields - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Verified buy_box_entry.json: all 27 system/computed fields already have read_only:1 (fetch_from fields, scoring fields, system dates), primary links (sku_product, seller) have set_only_once:1, admin fields (status, internal_notes) have permlevel:1. No changes needed. seller_application.json: added read_only:1 to erpnext_supplier (system-assigned ERPNext Supplier link). Verified all 18 read_only, 1 set_only_once, 10 permlevel protections correct.

subtasks.description: Update compliance app JSONs: (G2) Add read_only:1 to moderation/system fields in review.json, moderation_case.json, contract_instance.json. (G5) Add fetch_from for template_title, contract_type, tenant_name in contract_instance.json with read_only:1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/contract_instance/contract_instance.json')); fields={f['fieldname']:f for f in d['fields']}; ff=[f for f in fields.values() if f.get('fetch_from')]; print(f'{len(ff)} fetch_from fields - OK')"

subtasks.notes: G2: Added read_only:1 to moderation/system fields - review.json (flags_table), moderation_case.json (9 fields: auto-detection, system-calculated, audit). G5: Verified contract_instance.json already has fetch_from + read_only:1 for template_name, contract_type, tenant_name. Verification passes: 3 fetch_from fields - OK.

subtasks.description: Update marketing and logistics JSONs: (G2) Add read_only:1 to system fields in coupon.json, campaign.json (marketing), marketplace_shipment.json (logistics).

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_marketing/tradehub_marketing/tradehub_marketing/doctype/coupon/coupon.json')); ro=[f for f in d['fields'] if f.get('read_only')==1]; print(f'{len(ro)} read_only fields - OK')"

subtasks.notes: G2: Reviewed all 3 files. coupon.json already fully protected (6 read_only, 2 set_only_once, 1 permlevel:1). campaign.json already fully protected (12 read_only, 1 set_only_once, 4 permlevel:1). marketplace_shipment.json: Added read_only:1 to 16 system/carrier-managed fields (delivery_status, delivery_attempts, actual_delivery_date, delivery_time, delivered_to, delivery_signature, proof_of_delivery, label_generated, label_url, manifest_id, batch_id, total_volume, pod_verified, received_by, receiver_signature, signature_captured_at). Total: 31 read_only, 4 set_only_once, 2 permlevel:1. Commit: b6cef13

phases.name: Migration Patches & Schema Validation
phases.description: Create Gorev 3 discount migration patch, Gorev 4 Listing JSON field migration patch, update patches.txt, and run bench migrate to apply all schema changes and data migrations.

subtasks.description: Create migrate_discount_to_cascading.py for tradehub_commerce: Copy existing discount_percentage values to discount_1 for Order, Sub Order, Marketplace Order. Use Pattern 10 (migration patch template). Must be idempotent with NOT EXISTS check. Set flags.ignore_validate and flags.ignore_permissions.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import importlib.util; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('patch', 'apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/patches/migrate_discount_to_cascading.py'); mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); print('Patch file valid - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created migrate_discount_to_cascading.py with idempotent migration for Order, Sub Order, and Marketplace Order. Uses frappe.db.has_column() checks for both discount_percentage and discount_1 columns. Queries WHERE discount_percentage IS NOT NULL AND != 0 AND (discount_1 IS NULL OR = 0). Double-checks idempotency via flt(doc.discount_1, 2) > 0 before saving. Sets flags.ignore_validate and flags.ignore_permissions. Calls frappe.reload_doc() first. Follows migrate_json_to_child_tables.py pattern exactly.

subtasks.description: Create migrate_listing_json_fields.py for tradehub_seller: Migrate Listing JSON fields (attributes → listing_attribute_value child table, images → listing_image child table, bulk_pricing_tiers → listing_bulk_pricing_tier child table). Child DocTypes ALREADY EXIST — this patch only migrates data. Use parse_json_field helper from Pattern 10.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import importlib.util; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('patch', 'apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/patches/migrate_listing_json_fields.py'); mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); print('Patch file valid - OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created migrate_listing_json_fields.py following exact pattern from migrate_json_to_child_tables.py. Migrates 3 JSON fields: attributes → attribute_values (Listing Attribute Value), images → listing_images (Listing Image), bulk_pricing_tiers → pricing_tiers (Listing Bulk Pricing Tier). Idempotent with NOT EXISTS queries, parse_json_field helper, flags.ignore_validate/ignore_permissions. Verification passed. Commit a1e802f.

subtasks.description: Update patches.txt for all apps with new migration patches. Add: tradehub_commerce.patches.migrate_discount_to_cascading and tradehub_seller.patches.migrate_listing_json_fields. Verify existing patch entries are correct.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'migrate_discount_to_cascading' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/patches.txt && grep -c 'migrate_listing_json_fields' apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/patches.txt && echo 'OK'

subtasks.notes: Updated patches.txt for both tradehub_commerce and tradehub_seller apps. Added tradehub_commerce.patches.migrate_discount_to_cascading (Gorev 3) and tradehub_seller.patches.migrate_listing_json_fields (Gorev 4). Verified existing entries (migrate_json_to_child_tables) are correct and all referenced patch files exist with __init__.py. Verification passed. Commit de21397.

subtasks.description: Run bench migrate to apply ALL pending schema changes (from Phases 1-2) and run migration patches (from subtasks 3-1, 3-2). Verify no errors during migration.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && bench --site marketplace.local migrate 2>&1 | tail -5

subtasks.notes: Comprehensive pre-flight validation completed. bench migrate cannot run in isolated worktree (no DB/Frappe env). All 23 JSON schemas valid, cascading discount fields verified in 8 DocTypes, G2 field protections verified, G5 fetch_from verified, all 6 migration patches follow correct patterns (idempotent, safe, error-handled). All patches.txt entries reference existing files. Actual migration must be run in full Frappe bench environment.

phases.name: Python Server-Side Code
phases.description: Implement all Python code changes across all Gorevs: (G1) calculate_totals with flt() precision, (G2) verify/complete _guard_system_fields and _guard_primary_links, (G3) cascading discount formula, (G4) verify child table operations replace json.loads, (G5) verify/complete refetch_denormalized_fields.

subtasks.description: Update order.py: (G1) Verify calculate_totals uses flt(flt(qty,2)*flt(price,2),2) outer wrapping on item.amount — fix if using unwrapped multiplication. (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields and _guard_primary_links exist and are called first in validate(). (G3) Replace single discount_percentage calculation with cascading formula: price_after_d1 = flt(subtotal*(1-flt(d1,2)/100),2), repeat for d2/d3. (G5) Update refetch_denormalized_fields for any new fetch_from fields added in Phase 1.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.order.order import Order; print('Import OK')" 2>&1 | head -3

subtasks.notes: G1: Fixed calculate_totals - added outer flt(..., 2) wrapping on item.amount, flt on subtotal aggregation and self.subtotal. G2: Verified _guard_system_fields and _guard_primary_links called first in validate() - already correct. G3: Replaced single discount_percentage calc with cascading formula using discount_1/2/3 with validation (0-100 range) and effective_discount_pct computation. G5: Fixed refetch_denormalized_fields field name mismatches: seller_tier_name->seller_tier, quotation_total->quotation_amount to match JSON schema. All 16 pattern checks passed. Commit: 80a6aac.

subtasks.description: Update cart.py and sub_order.py: (G1) Implement/verify calculate_totals with flt(value,2) on ALL numeric ops. (G3) Add cascading discount formula identical to order.py. Ensure validate() ordering follows Pattern 9.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.cart.cart import Cart; from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.sub_order.sub_order import SubOrder; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.notes: G1: Fixed cart.py calculate_totals - all numeric ops wrapped with flt(value, 2), added if self.items guard. Fixed sub_order.py calculate_totals - added flt precision 2 to discount_value, tax_rate, commission_rate, and wrapped taxable_amount in flt(). G3: Cart - added cascading discount per cart line item (discount_1/2/3 fields on CartLine child table) with validation 0-100 range. SubOrder - added cascading discount at parent level identical to order.py formula, computes effective_discount_pct, total discount = item discounts + cascading. Pattern 9: Cart validate() reordered - moved check_expiry() before calculate_totals(). SubOrder validate() already follows Pattern 9 correctly. Syntax verified, formula tests passed.

subtasks.description: Update marketplace_order.py and quotation.py: (G1) Implement/verify calculate_totals with flt(value,2). (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields exists. For quotation.py, fix the existing calculate_totals which uses flt() without precision arg — add precision 2 to all currency ops.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.marketplace_order.marketplace_order import MarketplaceOrder; from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.quotation.quotation import Quotation; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.description: Update rfq.py and rfq_quote.py: (G1) Implement/verify calculate_totals with flt(value,2). (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields. (G5) Verify refetch_denormalized_fields covers buyer_name, seller_name, tenant_name.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.rfq.rfq import RFQ; from tradehub_commerce.tradehub_commerce.doctype.rfq_quote.rfq_quote import RFQQuote; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.description: Update listing.py in tradehub_seller: (G1) Implement/verify calculate_totals with flt(value,2) for child table calculations. (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields and _guard_primary_links. (G3) Add cascading discount formula. (G4) Verify json.loads/json.dumps for attributes/images/bulk_pricing_tiers are replaced with child table operations. (G5) Verify refetch_denormalized_fields covers seller_name, category_name, tenant_name.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_seller.tradehub_seller.doctype.listing.listing import Listing; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.notes: IMPORTANT: listing.py is a large file. Check if json.loads() calls remain for attributes/images/bulk_pricing_tiers — these should now use self.attribute_values (child table) etc. Do NOT touch json.loads() for fields that are KEEP (not in MIGRATE list).

subtasks.description: Update seller_profile.py and sku_product.py: (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields. (G4) For seller_profile, verify badges JSON field is replaced with seller_badges child table operations. (G5) For seller_profile, verify refetch_denormalized_fields covers new fetch_from fields (tenant_name, tier_name, etc.).

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_seller.tradehub_seller.doctype.seller_profile.seller_profile import SellerProfile; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.description: Update buyer_profile.py in tradehub_core: (G2) Verify _guard_system_fields exists and is called in validate(). (G5) Verify refetch_denormalized_fields covers buyer_category_name, tenant_name, organization_name.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_core.tradehub_core.doctype.buyer_profile.buyer_profile import BuyerProfile; print('Import OK')"

subtasks.description: Update shipping_rule.py (logistics) and coupon.py (marketing): (G1) Add rate tier calculation with flt(value,2) to shipping_rule.py. (G3) Ensure coupon.py applies coupon discounts AFTER cascading discounts — verify discount application ordering.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "from tradehub_logistics.tradehub_logistics.doctype.shipping_rule.shipping_rule import ShippingRule; from tradehub_marketing.tradehub_marketing.doctype.coupon.coupon import Coupon; print('Import OK')"

(G4) In moderation_case.py, verify/update moderation_history json.loads/json.dumps to use child table operations if applicable (check if moderation_action_log child table is the target). (G5) Verify refetch_denormalized_fields in contract_instance.py covers template_title, contract_type, tenant_name.

phases.name: JavaScript Client-Side Code
phases.description: Implement all JS code changes across all Gorevs: (G1) calculate_totals() and child table event handlers, (G2) role-based field locking, (G3) cascading discount client-side handlers, (G5) fetch_from cascade change handlers.

subtasks.description: Update order.js: (G1) Verify calculate_totals(frm) uses flt() on all numeric values, verify items_add/items_remove/field change handlers call calculate_totals. (G2) Verify role-based field authorization in refresh handler. (G3) Replace discount_percentage handler with cascading discount handlers for discount_1/2/3, update calculate_totals to use cascading formula. Add show_discount_tiers toggle handler.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'discount_1' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/order/order.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.notes: JS cascading discount formula: var price_after_d1 = flt(base * (1 - flt(frm.doc.discount_1) / 100)); var price_after_d2 = flt(price_after_d1 * (1 - flt(frm.doc.discount_2) / 100)); var final_price = flt(price_after_d2 * (1 - flt(frm.doc.discount_3) / 100));

subtasks.description: Update cart.js: (G1) Verify calculate_line_totals() and calculate_cart_totals() use flt(), verify child table handlers. (G3) Update to use cascading discount formula for cart line calculations.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'calculate' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/cart/cart.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.description: Update sub_order.js and marketplace_order.js: (G1) Add child table field change handlers (items_add, items_remove, quantity/unit_price change) and calculate_totals(frm). (G2) Add role-based field locking in refresh handler. (G3) Add cascading discount handlers for sub_order.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'calculate_totals' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/sub_order/sub_order.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.description: Update rfq.js, rfq_quote.js, commission_plan.js, escrow_account.js: (G1) Add child table field change handlers and calculate_totals(frm) for each. For rfq/rfq_quote, handle RFQ Item and RFQ Quote Item child table events. For commission_plan, handle Commission Plan Rate child table. For escrow_account, handle Escrow Event child table.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'calculate_totals\|items_add\|items_remove' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/rfq/rfq.js && echo 'OK'

(G5) Implement city→district→neighborhood cascade handler if applicable; verify category→subcategory cascade handler; verify tenant-based set_query filters.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'calculate_totals\|set_query' apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/listing/listing.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.description: Update seller_profile.js and buyer_profile.js: (G2) Verify/add role-based field authorization in refresh handler. (G5) For seller_profile.js, implement city→district→neighborhood cascade handler: when city changes, clear district/neighborhood and refresh; when district changes, clear neighborhood. Add set_query filters for tenant isolation on all Link fields.

subtasks.description: Update sku_product.js and seller_kpi.js: (G1) Add calculation handlers for SKU Product child tables and Seller KPI child table events. Use flt() on all numeric operations.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'flt\|calculate' apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/sku_product/sku_product.js && echo 'OK'

subtasks.description: Update marketing and logistics JS files: (G1) Add child table handlers for coupon.js (Coupon Category/Product Items), group_buy.js (Group Buy Tier/Commitment), wholesale_offer.js (Wholesale Offer Product), marketplace_shipment.js (shipping calculations). Use flt() for all numeric values.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -c 'calculate\|flt' apps/tradehub_marketing/tradehub_marketing/tradehub_marketing/doctype/coupon/coupon.js && echo 'OK'

phases.name: Build & Integration Verification
phases.description: Run bench build, clear cache, and perform end-to-end verification of all 5 Gorevs across all apps.

subtasks.description: Run bench build for all apps and clear cache. Verify no JS compilation errors. Run bench migrate one final time to ensure clean state.

verification.command: cd frappe-bench && bench build 2>&1 | tail -5 && bench --site marketplace.local clear-cache && echo 'Build OK'

subtasks.description: End-to-end verification: (1) Verify __init__.py files intact, (2) Verify triple-nested directory structure, (3) Verify no json.loads remains for migrated fields, (4) Verify all fetch_from fields have read_only:1, (5) Verify cascading discount fields exist in all target DocTypes, (6) Spot-check flt() usage in modified Python files.

steps: Run: find frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/doctype -name '__init__.py' | wc -l — verify count matches pre-change baseline
Run: ls frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/tradehub_core/doctype/ — verify directory exists with DocTypes
Run: bench --site marketplace.local migrate — verify no errors
Run: bench build — verify no JS errors
Verify Order JSON has discount_1, discount_2, discount_3 fields
Verify Seller Profile JSON has fetch_from fields for tenant_name, tier_name
Verify order.py calculate_totals uses flt(value, 2) on all operations
Verify order.js calculate_totals uses cascading discount formula
Verify existing tests pass: bench --site marketplace.local run-tests --app tradehub_commerce

gorev_coverage.gorev_2_field_auth: Phase 1-2 (JSON schema) + Phase 4 (Python guards) + Phase 5 (JS role checks)
gorev_coverage.gorev_3_cascading_discount: Phase 1-2 (JSON fields) + Phase 3 (migration patch) + Phase 4 (Python formula) + Phase 5 (JS formula)
gorev_coverage.gorev_4_json_migration: Phase 3 (Listing migration patch) + Phase 4 (Python code updates — subtasks 4-5, 4-6, 4-9)
gorev_coverage.gorev_5_fetch_from: Phase 1-2 (JSON fetch_from) + Phase 4 (Python refetch) + Phase 5 (JS cascade handlers)

parallel_groups.reason: Both are JSON schema changes to different apps — no file conflicts
Both depend only on phase-3, modify different file types (.py vs .js) in same apps — no file conflicts

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.5x faster than sequential — schema phases parallel, then code phases parallel

acceptance_criteria: bench --site marketplace.local migrate succeeds without errors
bench build succeeds without JS compilation errors
Triple-nested directory structure preserved for all 7 apps
hooks.py files only appended to, never overwritten
flt(value, 2) used on ALL Python numeric operations
flt() used on ALL JS numeric values
Cascading discount formula identical in JS and Python
Migration patches are idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
Tenant isolation not broken by any change
Turkish role names used consistently in authorization checks

verification_steps.name: Commerce Tests
verification_steps.command: cd frappe-bench && bench --site marketplace.local run-tests --app tradehub_commerce

verification_steps.name: Discount Field Verification
verification_steps.command: cd frappe-bench && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/order/order.json')); fields=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'discount_1' in fields and 'discount_2' in fields and 'discount_3' in fields; print('Discount fields present')"

verification_steps.name: flt() Coverage Check
verification_steps.command: cd frappe-bench && grep -rn 'item\.amount\s*=' apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/order/order.py | grep -v flt | wc -l

verification_strategy.reasoning: Critical risk: financial calculations (cascading discounts), permission/authorization changes (124 DocTypes), data migrations (JSON to child tables with data loss risk), schema changes across 7 apps. Maximum validation depth required.

commands: cd frappe-bench && bench --site marketplace.local run-tests --app tradehub_commerce
cd frappe-bench && bench --site marketplace.local run-tests --app tradehub_seller
cd frappe-bench && bench --site marketplace.local run-tests --app tradehub_core

flows: Order with cascading discount: Create → Add items → Set discount_1/2/3 → Save → Verify totals
Role-based field lock: Login as non-admin → Open Order → Verify read-only fields
fetch_from cascade: Open Listing → Select seller → Verify tenant_name auto-fill
Child table add/remove: Open Order → Add 3 items → Remove 1 → Verify recalculation

checks: Order table has discount_1, discount_2, discount_3 columns
All child table migrations completed (no orphaned JSON data)
